titleStmt.title: SII 25.289: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 289. (A.R. No. 289 of 1908.) AḶAGĀDRIPUTTŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East and South walls of the central shrine in Svarṇapurīśvara temple.
This record furnishes the details of date viz., year 4, Kuṁbha, Thursday and Aṉiḻa (Anusha-nakshatra).

It states that Paṭṭālagaṉ Ādittaṉ of Kallūr in Mēl-Vemba-nāḍu in Pāṇḍināḍu alias Rājaraja-maṇḍalam raised a shrine to the deity Sūryadēva in the Śrīkōyil of Tirupputtūr. The sabhai of Pāradāyakuḍi (peruṅguṟiperumakkaḷ), a brahmadēya in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇivaḷanāḍu which met at Śrīkurugūr-ma[ṉ*]ṟam, situated to the north of the village tank, decided to sell six mā of lands after obtaining the price-value of 30 kāśu and endowed the same after exempting it from taxes (iṟai-iḻichchi) to provide for the different food-offerings to the above deity.

The details of the boundaries of the gift land including the land mentioned as the uvachchappuṟam of the deity Tirunaraiyūrdēva, are specified. The lands yielded sixty kalam of paddy. The ends of lines 7 to 11 are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koppara keśarivarmmarāṉa śrī rājendracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu kṣattiriya cikāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu brahmateyam pāratāyakuṭipperuṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Ivvāṇṭaik kumpanāyaṟṟu viyāḻakkiḻamai peṟṟa
aṉiḻattiṉāṉṟu pakal Ivvūr Ūrkkuḷattiṉ vaṭakkil śrīkurukūr Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭum maṉṟattile kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟakkūṭiyiruntu paṇip paṇi ṇittu Eṅkaḷūr tirupputtūr śrīkoyilil pāṇṭināṭāṉa Irājarāja maṇṭalattu me
l vempunāṭṭuk kallūruṭaiyāṉ paṭṭālakaṉātittaṉ Eṭuppitta śrī koyil sūryya tevarkku tiruvamutukkum kaṟiyamutukkum neyamutukkum tayiramutukkum Aṭaikkā yamutukkum san=tiviḷakkukkum Uḷḷiṭṭu Ittevarkku veṇṭum nivan=taṅkaḷu
kku ṉāṅkaḷ viṟṟiṟaiyiḻiccik kuṭutta nilamāvatu sabhaiyom nilamkaramal(pa) neṭumpattil kiḻakkaṭaiya kiḻvarampum vaṭavarampum kappaṭa palataṭiyāyuḷakaḷan=ta kolāl van=ta nilam cāpa Inilaṉ Āṟumāvukkum kiḻpāṟkellai tirunaṟai
yūr tevar Uvaccappuṟattukku merkkum teṉpārkkellai Ivvūr māyāttaraviṉ nilattukkum pāratāyaṉ cāttaṉ Īśvaraṉuḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkum kaviṇiyaṉ comaṉ nārāyaṇa ṉilattukkum sabhaiyom nilattukkum tevar nera
ṉaṇaṉRead nārāyaṇaṉkāleṉṟu perkūvappaṭum nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai māṭilaṉ Aṉan=taṉ pūtibrāhmaṇi nilattukku kiḻakkum kellai muveliyuṭ ciṟupāykkālukkum kaviciyaṉ Ūrkaṇakkaṉ nilattukku teṟkum Āka Ivicaitta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilattil kīḻkkaṭaiya nila � Innila Āṟumāvum viṟṟu Iṟaiyiḻiccik kuṭuttukkoḷvatāṉa kācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatum Āvaṇak kaḷiye kaic celavaṟakkoṇṭu can=tirātitta villiṟaiyiḻiccik kuṭuttom sūryyatevarkku pāratāya kuṭipperu
itaṟṟiṟampil paṇitta brāhmaṇaraiyum paṇikeṭṭa karaṇattāraiyum Iṟaikāṭṭiṉāraiyum Ittevarkanmikaḷ tāṅkaḷ veṇṭuṅ kaḷattil tāṅkaḷ �—this line is lost.
ya kuṭipperuṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Ivarkaḷ paṇippaṇiyāliv virai kāval vilaiyāvaṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr madhyastan Aravaṇaiyā—
ppaṭiyaṟiveṉ kaviṇiyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ tāyaṉeṉṉivai yeṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ pāratāyaṉ veṅkaṭavaṉ ceṭṭiyeṉi—
llukkalaṉe Irutūṇippatakku nāṉāḻiyum neyyamutu Araippiṭikku nellu nāḻiyāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu mukkalaṉeyirutūṇi—
nellu kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka nel Aṟupatiṉ kalattukkum muṉcuṭṭappaṭṭa nilan Āṟumāvum can=tirātittavaṟ Itu panmayeśva—The ends of lines 7 to 11 are lost.
Digital edition of SII 25.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
